mnemonics: SSM FORECAST: State-Space Models are For Optimal, Recursive Estimation, Computation, And Smoothing of Time-series
keyPoints: The state-space model separates a time series into an unobserved state component and an observation equation with noise.
The Kalman filter provides an exact, recursive algorithm for forecasting, updating predictions as new data arrives.
This formulation allows for the incorporation of various time series models (like ARIMA) into a unified framework for prediction and smoothing.
commonMistakes: Assuming the initial state mean and covariance are known exactly, leading to poor initial forecasts.
Forgetting to check or violating the underlying assumptions of the model (e.g., Gaussian errors, linearity).
